title: From Tripods to Bipods: Reducing the Queue Number of Planar Graphs Costs Just One Leg

errors.description: The error is that the decomposition technique claimed as original in Theorems 1.2 and 1.3 was previously established by other authors, and furthermore, Lemma 4.2 is incorrect, rendering the current proofs insufficient and requiring new technical details.
Lemma 4.2 is incorrect, so the proof relying on it is invalid and requires new technical details to correct the decomposition argument.
